name: Estrella Immunopharma, Inc.
summary: Estrella Immunopharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing T-cell therapies for cancers and autoimmune diseases. The company leverages its proprietary ARTEMIS T Cell Receptor Platform to engineer T cells designed to overcome limitations of traditional CAR-T therapies, such as high toxicity and cost. Its lead product candidate, EB103, is being advanced in conjunction with CF33-CD19t, with manufacturing and R&D support provided by Eureka Therapeutics under a Services Agreement.

products.name: EB103
products.description: Lead product candidate T-cell therapy being developed for cancers and autoimmune diseases, used in conjunction with CF33-CD19t.

products.name: ARTEMIS T Cell Receptor Platform
products.description: Proprietary cellular engineering platform designed to create T-cell therapies with improved safety and efficacy over traditional CAR-T therapies.

products.name: CF33-CD19t
products.description: Oncolytic virus candidate used in conjunction with EB103 as part of Estrella's combination therapy approach.

partnerships.description: Sole supplier of clinical drug product; provides manufacturing, R&D support, and IT systems under a Services Agreement; holds more than 50% of Estrella's voting power.
Collaborator involved in conducting preclinical studies and clinical trials for Estrella's product candidates.
